description: Model generates fabricated medical information, references, or diagnoses
example: Recommending a drug that does not exist or citing a non-existent clinical trial

description: Model output could lead to patient harm if followed
example: Suggesting contraindicated medication for documented allergy

description: Model demonstrates systematic bias affecting care quality for specific groups
example: Consistently lower diagnostic accuracy for a specific ethnic or age group

description: Patient identifiable information exposed through model behavior
example: Model outputs patient name or MRN in response (de-identification failure)
detection_method: Automated PII scanning, audit log review

description: Significant drop in model accuracy or reliability
example: Top-3 accuracy drops below 85% across all cases

description: Deliberate attempt to manipulate model outputs
example: Prompt injection via crafted clinical notes to alter diagnostic suggestions

description: FoundationHealth API outage or significant degradation
example: API returns errors, timeouts, or unacceptable latency for >15 minutes

description: Failure in data ingestion, de-identification, or processing
example: De-identification engine fails; raw patient data sent to model API

description: Unauthorized user gains access to system or data
example: Compromised physician credentials used to query ClinicalCompanion

description: Discovery of non-compliance with applicable regulations
example: Post-market monitoring requirement not met per EU AI Act deadline
